scripts.bench:pro: pnpm --filter lazy-dom build && pnpm --filter jest-environment-lazy-dom build && pnpm --filter @lazy-dom/bench-pro compare
scripts.validate: pnpm --filter lazy-dom test && cd pro && ALLOW_CONSOLE_OUTPUT=true npx jest --testEnvironment jest-environment-lazy-dom --forceExit --maxWorkers=4 && cd .. && pnpm --filter test-react-source test:react
